column4: This should play when the second phase of the boss fight occurs.

column2: It seems to be reassembling itself out of the different parts...
Right. Everyone, be careful!
No, wait! It's splitting into pieces!
Of course it is. Be careful!
Is it...splitting apart?
Are you fucking kidding me?! It's splitting apart!
Lady cleric...?!
We are killing this guy NOW.
(Of course it isn't dead yet.)
It seems to be reassembling itself out of the different parts...
We can all see that!
Is it...splitting apart?
Are you fucking kidding me?! This again?
You're really foul-mouthed for a cleric, Lady Magda...
Shut up and kill this thing already!
It's getting up again... and splitting apart?!
Why can't this thing stay dead?!
You make it sound like it's my fault!
Just kill it already!
Yes, Maggie. Whatever you say, Maggie.
It splits apart?!
Just die already!
